mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from dbo.T_DOC_ORDER_TRACKING_OPS
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from dbo.T_DOC_ORDER_TRACKING_OPS
order by ${orderByClause}

update dbo.T_DOC_ORDER_TRACKING_OPS

organizationid = #{record.organizationid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
orderno = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

omsno = #{record.omsno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
trackingstatus = #{record.trackingstatus,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ordertype = #{record.ordertype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
